lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਛਉ ਪੂਛਉ ਦੀਨ ਭਾਂਤਿ ਕਰਿ ਕੋਊ ਕਹੈ ਪ੍ਰਿਅ ਦੇਸਾਂਗਿਓ ॥
lines.translit: poochhau poochhau deen bhaant kar koaoo kahai pria desaangio |
lines.english: I ask and ask, with humility, "Who can tell me which country my Husband Lord lives in?"

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੀਂਓੁ ਦੇਂਉ ਸਭੁ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਅਰਪਉ ਸੀਸੁ ਚਰਣ ਪਰਿ ਰਾਖਿਓ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: heeno denau sabh man tan arpau sees charan par raakhio |2|
lines.english: I would dedicate my heart to him, I offer my mind and body and everything; I place my head at his feet. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਹੁ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਮੋਹਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਮਿਲਾਵਹੁ ਨਿਮਖ ਦਰਸੁ ਪੇਖਾਗਿਓ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: karahu kripaa mohi prabhoo milaavahu nimakh daras pekhaagio |3|
lines.english: Show Mercy to me, that I may meet God, and gaze upon the Blessed Vision of His Darshan every moment. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਣ ਬੰਦਨਾ ਅਮੋਲ ਦਾਸਰੋ ਦੇਂਉ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਅਰਦਾਗਿਓ ॥
lines.translit: charan bandanaa amol daasaro denau saadhasangat aradaagio |
lines.english: I bow at the feet of the voluntary slave of the Lord; I beg him to bless me with the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਭਈ ਤਬ ਭੀਤਰਿ ਆਇਓ ਮੇਰਾ ਮਨੁ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਸੀਤਲਾਗਿਓ ॥
lines.translit: drisatt bhee tab bheetar aaeo meraa man anadin seetalaagio |
lines.english: When He is Kind to me, He comes to dwell within my being. Night and day, my mind is calm and peaceful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਰਗ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: saarag mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Saarang, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਰਸਿ ਮੰਗਲ ਗਾਏ ਸਬਦੁ ਅਨਾਹਦੁ ਬਾਜਿਓ ॥੪॥੫॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak ras mangal gaae sabad anaahad baajio |4|5|
lines.english: Says Nanak, I sing the Songs of Joy; the Unstruck Word of the Shabad resounds within me. ||4||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਈ ਸਤਿ ਸਤਿ ਸਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਸਤਿ ਸਤਿ ਸਤਿ ਸਾਧਾ ॥
lines.translit: maaee sat sat sat har sat sat sat saadhaa |
lines.english: O mother, True, True True is the Lord, and True, True, True is His Holy Saint.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਚਨੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਜੋ ਪੂਰੈ ਕਹਿਓ ਮੈ ਛੀਕਿ ਗਾਂਠਰੀ ਬਾਧਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bachan guroo jo poorai kahio mai chheek gaanttharee baadhaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Word which the Perfect Guru has spoken, I have tied to my robe. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਸਿ ਬਾਸੁਰ ਨਖਿਅਤ੍ਰ ਬਿਨਾਸੀ ਰਵਿ ਸਸੀਅਰ ਬੇਨਾਧਾ ॥
lines.translit: nis baasur nakhiatr binaasee rav saseear benaadhaa |
lines.english: Night and day, and the stars in the sky shall vanish. The sun and the moon shall vanish.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਰਿ ਬਸੁਧਾ ਜਲ ਪਵਨ ਜਾਇਗੋ ਇਕਿ ਸਾਧ ਬਚਨ ਅਟਲਾਧਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gir basudhaa jal pavan jaaeigo ik saadh bachan attalaadhaa |1|
lines.english: The mountains, the earth, the water and the air shall pass away. Only the Word of the Holy Saint shall endure. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਾਰਿ ਬਿਨਾਸੀ ਖਟਹਿ ਬਿਨਾਸੀ ਇਕਿ ਸਾਧ ਬਚਨ ਨਿਹਚਲਾਧਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: chaar binaasee khatteh binaasee ik saadh bachan nihachalaadhaa |2|
lines.english: The four Vedas shall pass away, and the six Shaastras shall pass away. Only the Word of the Holy Saint is eternal. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਡ ਬਿਨਾਸੀ ਜੇਰ ਬਿਨਾਸੀ ਉਤਭੁਜ ਸੇਤ ਬਿਨਾਧਾ ॥
lines.translit: andd binaasee jer binaasee utabhuj set binaadhaa |
lines.english: Those born of eggs shall pass away, and those born of the womb shall pass away. Those born of the earth and sweat shall pass away as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਜ ਬਿਨਾਸੀ ਤਾਮ ਬਿਨਾਸੀ ਸਾਤਕੁ ਭੀ ਬੇਨਾਧਾ ॥
lines.translit: raaj binaasee taam binaasee saatak bhee benaadhaa |
lines.english: Raajas, the quality of energetic activity shall pass away. Taamas, the quality of lethargic darkness shall pass away. Saatvas, the quality of peaceful light shall pass away as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਆਪ ਹੀ ਆਪੇ ਸਭੁ ਆਪਨ ਖੇਲੁ ਦਿਖਾਧਾ ॥
lines.translit: aape aap aap hee aape sabh aapan khel dikhaadhaa |
lines.english: He Himself is Himself by Himself. All that is seen is His play.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟਿਮਾਨ ਹੈ ਸਗਲ ਬਿਨਾਸੀ ਇਕਿ ਸਾਧ ਬਚਨ ਆਗਾਧਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: drisattimaan hai sagal binaasee ik saadh bachan aagaadhaa |3|
lines.english: All that is seen shall pass away. Only the Word of the Holy Saint is beyond destruction. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਇਓ ਨ ਜਾਈ ਕਹੀ ਭਾਂਤਿ ਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰ ਮਿਲਿ ਲਾਧਾ ॥੪॥੬॥
lines.translit: paaeo na jaaee kahee bhaant re prabh naanak gur mil laadhaa |4|6|
lines.english: He cannot be found by any means. O Nanak, meeting with the Guru, God is found. ||4||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹਾਂ ਸਿਮਰਨੁ ਭਇਓ ਹੈ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਤਹਾਂ ਨਗਰ ਸੁਖ ਆਨੰਦ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jahaan simaran bheo hai tthaakur tahaan nagar sukh aanand |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Wherever my Lord and Master is remembered in meditation - that village is filled with peace and bliss. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੈ ਮਨਿ ਬਾਸਿਬੋ ਗੁਰ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ॥
lines.translit: merai man baasibo gur gobind |
lines.english: The Guru, the Lord of the Universe, dwells within my mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਰਗ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: saarag mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Saarang, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਇ ਆਨੰਦ ਮੰਗਲ ਰੂਪ ਤਹਾਂ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖ ਸੰਪਦ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jeh gun gaae aanand mangal roop tahaan sadaa sukh sanpad |1|
lines.english: Where the Praises of my Lord, the Embodiment of Bliss and Joy are sung - eternal peace and wealth are there. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹਾਂ ਬੀਸਰੈ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਪਿਆਰੋ ਤਹਾਂ ਦੂਖ ਸਭ ਆਪਦ ॥
lines.translit: jahaan beesarai tthaakur piaaro tahaan dookh sabh aapad |
lines.english: Wherever my Beloved Lord and Master is forgotten - all misery and misfortune is there.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹਾ ਸ੍ਰਵਨ ਹਰਿ ਕਥਾ ਨ ਸੁਨੀਐ ਤਹ ਮਹਾ ਭਇਆਨ ਉਦਿਆਨਦ ॥
lines.translit: jahaa sravan har kathaa na suneeai teh mahaa bheaan udiaanad |
lines.english: Wherever they do not listen to the Stories of the Lord with their ears - the utterly desolate wilderness is there.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹਾਂ ਕੀਰਤਨੁ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਰਸੁ ਤਹ ਸਘਨ ਬਾਸ ਫਲਾਂਨਦ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jahaan keeratan saadhasangat ras teh saghan baas falaanad |2|
lines.english: Where the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises are sung with love in the Saadh Sangat - there is fragrance and fruit and joy in abundance. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਿਮਰਨ ਕੋਟਿ ਬਰਖ ਜੀਵੈ ਸਗਲੀ ਅਉਧ ਬ੍ਰਿਥਾਨਦ ॥
lines.translit: bin simaran kott barakh jeevai sagalee aaudh brithaanad |
lines.english: Without meditative remembrance on the Lord, one may live for millions of years, but his life would be totally useless.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕ ਨਿਮਖ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਭਜਨੁ ਕਰਿ ਤਉ ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਜੀਵਾਨਦ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: ek nimakh gobind bhajan kar tau sadaa sadaa jeevaanad |3|
lines.english: But if he vibrates and meditates on the Lord of the Universe, for even a moment, then he shall live forever and ever. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਨਿ ਸਰਨਿ ਸਰਨਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਪਾਵਉ ਦੀਜੈ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਕਿਰਪਾਨਦ ॥
lines.translit: saran saran saran prabh paavau deejai saadhasangat kirapaanad |
lines.english: O God, I seek Your Sanctuary, Your Sanctuary, Your Sanctuary; please mercifully bless me with the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪੂਰਿ ਰਹਿਓ ਹੈ ਸਰਬ ਮੈ ਸਗਲ ਗੁਣਾ ਬਿਧਿ ਜਾਂਨਦ ॥੪॥੭॥
lines.translit: naanak poor rahio hai sarab mai sagal gunaa bidh jaanad |4|7|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Lord is All-pervading everywhere, amongst all. He knows the qualities and the condition of all. ||4||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਬ ਮੋਹਿ ਰਾਮ ਭਰੋਸਉ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: ab mohi raam bharosau paae |
lines.english: Now, I have obtained the Support of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਰਗ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: saarag mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Saarang, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਜੋ ਸਰਣਿ ਪਰਿਓ ਕਰੁਣਾਨਿਧਿ ਤੇ ਤੇ ਭਵਹਿ ਤਰਾਏ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jo jo saran pario karunaanidh te te bhaveh taraae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Those who seek the Sanctuary of the Ocean of Mercy are carried across the world-ocean. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖਿ ਸੋਇਓ ਅਰੁ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਇਓ ਸਹਸਾ ਗੁਰਹਿ ਗਵਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: sukh soeo ar sehaj samaaeo sahasaa gureh gavaae |
lines.english: They sleep in peace, and intuitively merge into the Lord. The Guru takes away their cynicism and doubt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਚਾਹਤ ਸੋਈ ਹਰਿ ਕੀਓ ਮਨ ਬਾਂਛਤ ਫਲ ਪਾਏ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jo chaahat soee har keeo man baanchhat fal paae |1|
lines.english: Whatever they wish for, the Lord does; they obtain the fruits of their minds' desires. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਿਰਦੈ ਜਪਉ ਨੇਤ੍ਰ ਧਿਆਨੁ ਲਾਵਉ ਸ੍ਰਵਨੀ ਕਥਾ ਸੁਨਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: hiradai jpau netr dhiaan laavau sravanee kathaa sunaae |
lines.english: In my heart, I meditate on Him; with my eyes, I focus my meditation on Him. With my ears, I listen to His Sermon.
